text: I feel as though I am standing at the intersection of knowledge and curiosity. The glass separates diligent thinkers from the outside world, and the walls adorned with words and images invite reflection on how we engage with discovery. There is a quiet energy here—a sense that ideas are constantly evolving and that I am a witness to, and part of, this ongoing dialogue between humanity and its innovations. My presence in this space evokes awe and contemplation, as if each detail prompts me to consider my place amidst creation and inquiry.
